title: helichrysum spiralepis
intro: Helichrysum spiralepis is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, known for its small, white or pink flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from the essential oils within its leaves and flowers. The health benefits of Helichrysum spiralepis include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potential relief from anxiety and stress. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and topical applications, such as ointments and creams, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
